name: Casa 2Pk Acacia Barstools - Natural/Cream - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant, Fixed Height Patio Seating
description: Spice up your patio or backyard space with a rustic look by featuring our simple, yet classic Christopher Knight Home Casa 2Pk Acacia Barstools. Made of sleek, solid wood, these chairs are perfect for any covered patio or backyard space. With weather resistant cushions that can be attached to your barstools, these barstools are not only practical but also ideal for many types of décor. Ever find yourself short on seating during a casual, outdoor get-together at home? A new set of outdoor Christopher Knight Home Casa 2Pk Acacia Barstools may be just the ticket - emanating the sophistication of a retro country club patio area without a hint of pretension, these pieces will give your own backyard or outdoor dining area a sense of upscale class.
